title: For sale one slightly used Unit 01 Buy It Now 150000000
display_title: For sale one slightly used Unit 01 Buy It Now 150000000
wikitext:
[]: For sale, one slightly used Unit-01; Buy-It-Now ¥150,000,000             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Sep 08, 2011 11:56 am Bochan_bird, http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/oldeva/2001-March/039165.html I found the following ad on the Japanese auction pages. The starting price is 100,000,000 and the Buy-it-Now price is 150,000,000. ======================================== With Second Impact failing to occur as expected in 2000, the judgement has been made that it is no longer necessary to prepare for the anticipated Angel attacks in the year 2015. Thus, it has been decided to sell the prototype Evangelion Unit 00. Faced with inevitable budget cutbacks, Gehirn (scheduled for restructuring into NERV) is undergoing severe financial difficulties, and this sale is being made for reasons of cash flow. The unit colour is the initial prototype yellow, and the accessory items included in this sale are listed below. Major items that are not included are also listed for reference. We would like to be able to post photographs and other images, but unfortunately were unable to obtain approval from the company holding the publicity rights. However, the lucky purchaser will be led to the storage site and allowed to inspect the actual unit before finalisation of the sale. Please note that the storage site is highly classified, so the purchaser will be led to the site blindfolded. The unit has been activated in indoor tests several times but never used outside, and is in excellent condition. However, it did berserk on one occasion and there is some residual damage to the right arm. The umbilical cable is supplied, but the power generating facilities are not, and the purchaser is requested to make suitable arrangements on their own. The power supply is industrial DC 1500 V, which may be obtainable from a nearby train line. However, please note that Gehirn cannot be held liable for any charges of theft and compensation to said railway company arising thereof. The DVD disc containing the remote monitoring and measurement application software has been lost and is not available. In addition, the MAGI system is also used for purposes other than operating the Eva unit, so it is not included in this auction. As such, the unit will not activate simply by supplying power ミ in fact, it probably will not work unless you are able to develop or outsource the required application software. For reference, I believe Gehirn used VisualBasic. Accessories: Progressive (Prog) knife (1), pallet gun (1, includes 150 rounds), umbilical cable (1), L.C.L. (enough for approximately 3 times), entry plug (1), plug suit (1, size = junior M) Not included: Dummy plug, S^2 engine, MAGI system, Lance of Longinus, pilot As noted above, it is thought that actual operation will be quite difficult. Therefore, bidders should be aware that while Gehirn guarantees the operation of the hardware, there is no guarantee of clearing the activation conditions. ========================================

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Sep 08, 2011 1:48 pm Gehirn used Visual Basic for their Evas' hardware drivers?! No wonder it never worked!

[]:             Quote Post by Sephizim » Thu Sep 08, 2011 1:51 pm All in all, that seems like a pretty good deal. Operational or not, I would have thought that the cost of buying an EVA would be enough to bankrupt a small country...

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Sep 08, 2011 2:34 pm Obligatory: Shut up and take my money

[]:             Quote Post by Razeil100 » Thu Sep 08, 2011 2:52 pm mite b cool

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Sep 08, 2011 4:09 pm does it come with a warranty that covers Angel or N2 damage?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Thu Sep 08, 2011 4:11 pm Seems legit.

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Sep 08, 2011 4:24 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: does it come with a warranty that covers Angel or N2 damage?

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Thu Sep 08, 2011 5:22 pm

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Sep 08, 2011 6:16 pm How about parts and service?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu Sep 08, 2011 7:43 pm Is the plugsuit for boy or girl?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Sep 08, 2011 8:21 pm arael wrote: Is the plugsuit for boy or girl?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Sep 09, 2011 12:57 pm I'll start up the collection.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Fri Sep 09, 2011 2:45 pm woah thought a eva would be way more expensive. Must pool all resources to buy this (not)

[]:             Quote Post by Deepak » Fri Sep 09, 2011 7:40 pm I don't think I've had enough emotional trauma to pilot

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Sep 09, 2011 8:30 pm Deepak wrote: I don't think I've had enough emotional trauma to pilot

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Fri Sep 09, 2011 8:35 pm "The power supply is industrial DC 1500 V, which may be obtainable from a nearby train line"

[]:             Quote Post by Deepak » Sat Sep 10, 2011 12:07 pm Clover wrote: "The power supply is industrial DC 1500 V, which may be obtainable from a nearby train line"

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Sat Sep 10, 2011 4:11 pm I'd buy it.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Sep 10, 2011 7:48 pm Aiko Heiwa wrote: I'd buy it.
